# FlightDealsPro — JustFly USA Affiliate
> Updated: 2026-05-29
> Affiliate links present

## About
20,000+ page USA affiliate site for JustFly.com flight booking.
Covers all 50 states, 120 US city pairs, international routes, and 200 long-tail flight keywords.

## Site: https://brightlane.github.io/justflydeals/
